name: Janus — Ransomware Kill Chain Coverage (ACC Hackathon 2026)
description: ATT&CK Navigator coverage layer for the Janus purple team emulation run at ACC Hackathon 2026. Green = detected by Wazuh during live run. Red = executed but not detected (gap). Detection rules (Sigma YAML) are available in the sigma/ directory of this repository.

techniques.comment: DETECTED — Wazuh alert: 'Windows command prompt started by an abnormal process.' Atomic Red Team Test 1. Sigma rule: sigma/T1059.001_powershell_execution.yml

metadata.name: wazuh_alert
metadata.value: Windows command prompt started by an abnormal process

techniques.comment: MISSED — Executed but not detected. Root cause: no Sysmon EID 12/13 rules for HKCU/HKLM Run keys in Wazuh. Gap closed by Sigma rule: sigma/T1547.001_registry_run_key.yml

metadata.name: root_cause
metadata.value: No Sysmon registry event rules in Wazuh for Run key paths

techniques.comment: DETECTED — Wazuh alert: 'Windows command prompt started by an abnormal process.' Atomic Red Team Test 1 (ProcDump). Sigma rule: sigma/T1003.001_lsass_dump.yml

metadata.name: wazuh_alert
metadata.value: Windows command prompt started by an abnormal process

techniques.comment: DETECTED — Wazuh alert: 'Windows logon success.' Atomic Red Team Test 1. Sigma rule: sigma/T1550.002_pass_the_hash.yml
DETECTED — Wazuh alert: 'Windows command prompt started by an abnormal process.' Atomic Red Team Test 1. Sigma rule: sigma/T1071.001_c2_beacon_http.yml

metadata.name: wazuh_alert
metadata.value: Windows command prompt started by an abnormal process

techniques.comment: MISSED — Executed but not detected. Root cause: no Wazuh rule targeting vssadmin.exe with delete shadows arguments. Gap closed by Sigma rule: sigma/T1490_shadow_copy_deletion.yml

metadata.name: root_cause
metadata.value: No detection rule for vssadmin.exe shadow deletion

techniques.comment: MISSED — Executed but not detected. Root cause: no Sysmon EID 11 rules monitoring ransomware file extensions (.encrypted, .enc, etc.). Gap closed by Sigma rule: sigma/T1486_file_encryption.yml

metadata.name: root_cause
metadata.value: No FileCreate monitoring for ransomware extensions
